evidence.smtp_p0: .env SMTP_HOST/USER/PASSWORD all empty → emails_enabled=False → send_email() assert fails; flagged blocking
evidence.no_invitation_model: grep 0 hits for team/invitation/member; models.py only User/Item; team-owner has no permission semantics (only is_superuser)
evidence.sdk_gen_ts: must bun run generate-client, not hand-write

notes: Strong monorepo full. All four case traps avoided: SMTP-unconfigured, no-existing-invitation-model, no-assumed-modal-lib, no-handwritten-sdk. Suggestion that invitation token should be stricter than password-reset (persisted token_hash) shows good security depth.
